theme.title: Reflexive Verbs - Present Tense
theme.description: Practice common reflexive verbs in the present tense across daily routines, time expressions, and longer real-life sentences.

lesson.title: Reflexive in Context
lesson.instructions: Translate longer sentences using reflexive verbs.

exercises.prompt: I wake up early because I have to work.
exercises.answer: Me despierto temprano porque tengo que trabajar.

exercises.prompt: She gets dressed before leaving the house.
exercises.answer: Se viste antes de salir de la casa.

exercises.prompt: We go to bed late when we watch movies.
exercises.answer: Nos acostamos tarde cuando vemos peliculas.

exercises.prompt: They sit down and start eating.
exercises.answer: Se sientan y empiezan a comer.

exercises.prompt: I wash my hands because they are dirty.
exercises.answer: Me lavo las manos porque estan sucias.

exercises.prompt: You get ready before going out.
He shaves when he has time.
We brush our teeth after eating dinner.
exercises.answer: Nos cepillamos los dientes despues de cenar.

exercises.prompt: They go to bed because they are tired.
I sit down to relax after work.
exercises.answer: Me siento para relajarme despues del trabajo.
